articles.title: Gunman killed after opening fire on Secret Service checkpoint outside White House, officials say - CBS News
articles.description: A bystander was also wounded, but no Secret Service officers were injured, officials said. President Trump was in the White House at the time of the incident.

articles.description: At Kouri Richins' sentencing for the murder of Eric Richins, her husband and father of their three sons, she declared her innocence to the court and to her children. But for jurors on the case, the evidence told a different story.
